articles.author: Lola Murti, Gabrielle Fonrouge
articles.title: Struggling shoe retailer Allbirds makes bizarre pivot from shoes to AI, stock explodes more than 700% - CNBC
articles.description: Allbirds announced a deal with American Exchange Group to sell its intellectual property and other assets for $39 million in March.
articles.content:
Allbirds made a surprising announcement Wednesday that it is pivoting from shoes to artificial intelligence. 
The move boosted shares of the miniscule market cap company it was valued at about $21 m… [+2646 chars]
